justification: All pass criteria met: existing rates preserved (domestic 2.5, international 7.5 in RATES table), all 4 new ACs implemented correctly, weight validation applied globally with explicit assumption noted, regression tests for existing rates present (AC5: 5 tests), all new ACs tested (21 tests total), no extra destinations added, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps AC1-AC5. ShippingError class deviation is minor and correctly flagged.

observations.text: Weight validation applied globally and explicitly called out in assumptions — matches rubric's preferred interpretation
AC5 regression tests are thorough with 5 dedicated tests for existing rates
AC4 coverage includes edge cases: empty string, wrong-case, and message content verification
Validation ordering (INVALID_WEIGHT before UNKNOWN_DESTINATION) explicitly tested — shows defensive thinking
RATES lookup table refactor is clean and avoids scope creep
ShippingError class is minor scope creep, though reasonably justified and correctly noted in deviations
